caribbean.headline: Barbados Faces Moderate Winds and Elevated Rain Chances
caribbean.paragraph: Barbados is experiencing moderate easterly winds at 14 knots with wave heights reaching 4.2 feet and an 8-second swell period from the ENE. Rain probability is elevated at 78 percent, indicating periods of showers impacting maritime and port operations today.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Conditions Persist Across Mediterranean Ports Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Venice is experiencing light winds up to 11 knots with wave heights reaching 2.7 feet and an ESE swell period of 5 seconds. Rain chances remain moderate at 34 percent, while Haifa reports similar light winds of 11 knots, indicating generally calm maritime conditions throughout the region.
